summary: HandyHub Client Dashboard i18n and Admin Password Display Bug Fixes - All tests passed. Verified: 1) Client dashboard language selector is now visible in header, 2) Language switching to Ukrainian/Spanish translates all UI text correctly, 3) Client profile menu sections expand/collapse properly on click, 4) Admin Users panel shows passwords as plaintext directly without toggle button.

success_rate.backend: N/A - API verified via manual curl test

client_dashboard_language_selector.description: Language selector dropdown in client dashboard header
tests: Language selector is visible in client dashboard header

client_dashboard_translation.description: Full UI translation when language is switched
tests: Language switching to Ukrainian translates all UI text
Language switching to Spanish translates all UI text

client_profile_menu_functionality.description: Profile menu items expand/collapse on click
tests: Account details section expands to show Name/Email/Phone

admin_users_plaintext_passwords.description: Admin Users panel displays passwords as plaintext without toggle
tests: Passwords like 'admin123' and 'test123' are displayed as plaintext
No toggle button in password column - passwords shown directly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified: 1) Client dashboard now has LanguageSelector component in header, 2) All static text wrapped with t() translation function and translates properly, 3) Profile menu uses toggle state (activeSection) for expand/collapse, 4) Admin users panel removed toggle button and shows plain_password field directly.
